brief.coreMessage: Demonstrating call recording and real-time transcription capabilities of Voice API

headlines: Record Calls and Transcribe in Real-Time with Sub-500ms Latency
Voice API with 140+ Country Coverage and Instant Transcription
Secure Call Recording and Live Transcription on a Single Platform
Voice AI Powered by Telnyx’s Own Network for Low Latency
HIPAA/SOC2/PCI Compliant Voice API with Real-Time Call Transcription
descriptions: Use Telnyx Voice API to capture call recordings and generate transcripts instantly with inference co-located on the telephony network, ensuring under 500ms latency.
Deploy voice applications in 70+ languages across 140+ countries with a single platform that integrates call recording and real-time transcription while maintaining HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliance.
Telnyx’s integrated Voice API provides simultaneous call recording and transcription, leveraging a proprietary network to reduce latency and simplify infrastructure management.

reasons: Product highlight for voice-api with 4 product keywords
